mvp_acceptance.given: an authorized directory with PDF and DOCX
mvp_acceptance.then: only files inside the authorized boundary are registered and indexed or receive explicit errors

mvp_acceptance.when: a new PDF is copied in
mvp_acceptance.then: only the new file is indexed and becomes searchable without a full rebuild
the old version stays queryable until the new version is fully indexed and atomically activated

mvp_acceptance.when: it is renamed without content change
mvp_acceptance.then: the path is updated and embeddings are reused

mvp_acceptance.when: it is deleted or permission is revoked
mvp_acceptance.then: it immediately disappears from retrieval and derived records are cleaned later
the answer cites filename, page/section and exact source excerpt

mvp_acceptance.given: a question not supported by the corpus
mvp_acceptance.then: the system reports insufficient evidence and does not use model knowledge to invent an answer
restricted chunks never enter candidate results

mvp_acceptance.when: the application is interrupted and restarted
mvp_acceptance.then: the job resumes or retries without duplicate chunks or vectors
files are processed sequentially/in batches and memory does not grow linearly with total corpus bytes

graph_acceptance.then: graph features can be disabled without breaking baseline RAG
every entity relation used in an answer links to one or more authorized source chunks
an ablation test shows useful gain on multi-hop questions before graph retrieval is enabled by default
